keyBenefits.description: Inner blocks can now utilize the full viewport width without being constrained by the container's padding or max-width
The title and description header area remains properly contained and centered, maintaining readability
Inner blocks can choose to be full-width (e.g., hero sections, carousels) or contained (e.g., text blocks) based on their own styling
Allows proper nesting of full-width blocks within the demo container without layout conflicts

useCases: Full-width hero blocks that need edge-to-edge backgrounds
Carousel blocks that need to show partial next/previous slides
Gallery blocks that break out of container constraints
Any block that implements its own container/padding logic

revisionsApplied.change: Move container div inside header conditional
revisionsApplied.implementation: The container div now only wraps the header area (title + description), not the inner blocks
revisionsApplied.details: Header content stays contained for readability, while inner blocks can use full width

revisionsApplied.change: Render inner blocks as direct children of demo-container wrapper
revisionsApplied.implementation: InnerBlocks/children are now rendered directly under the demo-container div, after the optional header container
revisionsApplied.details: Inner blocks have no horizontal padding or max-width constraints from the demo-container
